core_message: Study computer science in Tainan and build a practical future through solid learning, teamwork, and hands-on projects.
platform_choice: OpenClaw or Hermes Agent with zero-paid-token mock workflow

scenes.content_goal: Connect technology learning with future possibilities.
Introduce National University of Tainan Department of Computer Science and Information Engineering.
Show programming, AI, data, systems, networks, and practical training.
Show projects, teamwork, discussion, demos, and presentation.
Show classmates, teachers, campus, and learning environment without privacy risks.
End with department name and slogan.

assigned_agents.script_agent: Write narration and subtitles based on the 6-scene outline.
assigned_agents.visual_agent: Create storyboard, shot list, and asset requirements.
assigned_agents.reviewer_agent: Check assignment compliance, copyright, privacy, truthfulness, and video length.
assigned_agents.finalizer_agent: Integrate revised outputs into final production checklist.

asset_policy: Self-made or openly licensed materials only. Avoid unauthorized logos, music, private information, and recognizable people without consent.
